name: every rule in the corpus is tagged with at least one development path (no rule is left unpathed)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-path.sh" --audit 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -qE 'classify-path total=[0-9]+ iac=[0-9]+ fullstack=[0-9]+ both=[0-9]+ unpathed=0' e.txt && echo every-rule-pathed 1>&2
